LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINANT SCOTT HALL MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT RAISED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE SUSTAINED. BUT EVEN IF OBJECTIONS OVERRULED, NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 7031 CONTROLS WITHOUT EXCEPTION. NO ENFORCEABLE SETTLEMENT OCCURRED. IN RE MARRIAGE OF ASSEMI (1994) 7 CAL.4TH 896 DISTINGUISHABLE BECAUSE THE ISSUE IN THAT CASE WAS WHETHER A SETTLEMENT BEFORE A COURT APPOINTED RETIRED JUDGE/ARBITRATOR WAS "BEFORE THE COURT" FOR PURPOSES OF CCP SECTION 664.6. THE COURT ADOPTS CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, EXCEPT FOR CORRECTION OF PROPOSED ORDER'S TITLE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) (ORDER ON CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S HALLS OBJEC. TO EVID. FILED.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-03-2009 Set For Case Management Conference On Oct-02-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANT SCOTT HALL MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Jonathan M. Bowne, Esq. of Last & Faoro, (650) 696-8350, appearing for Cross-Complaint and moving party; James Attridge, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 552-3088, appearing for Cross-Defendant Curren, and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary adjudication is granted. No triable issue of material fact raised. Cross-complainant's objections to evidence sustained. But even if objections overruled, no triable issue of material fact. Business & Professions Code section 7031 controls without exception. No enforceable settlement occurred. In re Marriage of Assemi (1994) 7 Cal.4th 896 distinguishable because the issue in that case was whether a settlement before a court appointed retired judge/arbitrator was "before the Court" for purposes of CCP section 664.6. The Court adopts cross-complainant's Proposed Order granting summary adjudication, except for correction of Proposed Order's title. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (Order on Cross-Complainant's Halls Objec. to Evid. Filed.)(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Continued To Aug-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANT SCOTT HALL'S Motion for Leave to Amend Cross-Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, movant filed Amended Cross-Complaint on March 26, 2009, per stipulation and order. (302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Tamara Willat-Harrison, CSR 4609

Notice Of Motion To Compel The Appearance Of Martin Gerard Curran For Deposition And The Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Sott Hall's motion to compel the appearance of Martin Gerard Curran for deposition and production of documents and for sanctions.
1. Motion To Compel Appearance Of Martin Gerard Curran For Deposition And Production Of Documents granted; within ten days of the date of service of this order, defendant Curran shall appear for deposition and produce documents pursuant to notice of deposition, at a date, time and place to be designated by counsel for defendant Hall;
2. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $790.00 to run against defendant Curran and his counsel, and payable within 30 days of the date of service of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT SCOTT HALL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ON CROSS-COMPLAINT OF MARTIN GERARD CURREN. Appearances: James Attridge, Esq., of Law Offices of James Attridge, (415) 552-3088, appearing for Defendant, and Cross-complainant, Martin Gerard Currran, individually, dba, Kilcher Construction, and moving party. There are no other appearances. There is no argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: James Attridge, Esq., appearing Defendant and Cross-Defendant Martin Gerard Curran, Martin Gerard Curran, dba, Kilcur. Jonathan M. Bowne, Esq., appearing for Defendant, Cross-Complainant and Cross-Defendant Scott Hall, and specially appearing for Plaintiff. Case Management Conference is held this day. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 4/6/2009 at 9:00 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Nici Rodich, CSR# 11604. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement; Declarations Of Gregory Stubbs, James Attridge, Martin Curren, And Richard C. Stromberg In Support
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT MARTIN CURREN'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement.
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MARTIN CURREN'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement IS DENIED. CCP SECTION 664.6 REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES SIGN THE AGREEMENT FOR IT TO BE ENFORCEABLE BY A MOTION. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/PB)
